workflow.name: Generate UGC product video ads from a reference image with OpenAI and Kie.ai
workflow.description:
How it works

- Analyzes a reference product image using AI vision to extract brand elements, colors, and design

- Generates UGC-style prompts for image and video creation based on your specifications

- Calls external APIs to generate product images and videos at scale

- Polls for completion and retrieves the generated media files

- Uploads all videos to Box and Google Drive, then logs results to Google Sheets

Set up steps

- Connect OpenAI credentials for image analysis

- Configure your image generation API credentials

- Configure your video generation API credentials

- Connect Google Drive and Box for file uploads

- Connect Google Sheets for tracking and logging

- Keep detailed descriptions of your UGC style preferences in the sticky notes inside your workflow

parameters.text:
Return the analysis in YAML format with the following fields:

brand_name: (Name of the brand shown in the image, if visible or inferable)
color_scheme:
  - hex: (Hex code of each prominent color used)
    name: (Descriptive name of the color)
font_style: (Describe the font family or style used: serif/sans-serif, bold/thin, etc.)
visual_description: (A full sentence or two summarizing what is seen in the image, ignoring the background)

Only return the YAML. Do not explain or add any other comments.

parameters.content:
## Image Generation Loop

Generates keyframe images using Kie.ai API. Each image serves as the first frame for video generation.

## Video Generation Loop

Generates AI videos using the keyframes and dialogue. Downloads final video files.

nodes.name: 📋 Overview: Scale product videos with AI-generated UGC content

parameters.content:
## Scale product videos with AI-generated UGC content

This workflow automates the creation of UGC-style product videos at scale. It analyzes a reference image, generates AI prompts for image and video creation, calls external APIs to generate media, and uploads the final videos to cloud storage with tracking.

### How it works
1. Upload a reference product image and specify video count
2. AI analyzes the image and generates UGC-style prompts
3. Calls image generation API to create product visuals
4. Calls video generation API to create UGC-style videos
5. Polls for completion and retrieves generated files
6. Uploads videos to Box and Google Drive
7. Logs all results to Google Sheets

### Setup steps
1. Connect OpenAI credentials for image analysis
2. Configure image generation API credentials
3. Configure video generation API credentials
4. Connect Google Drive and Box for file uploads
5. Connect Google Sheets for result tracking
6. Update reference image link in Setup node

## Stage 1: Setup and image analysis

Configures workflow variables and analyzes reference product image using OpenAI vision to extract brand, colors, and visual elements.

## Stage 2: Prompt generation

Uses AI agent to generate UGC-style prompts for image and video creation based on analysis, user preferences, and dialogue script.

## Stage 3: Media generation and polling

Calls image and video generation APIs with generated prompts. Polls for completion status and retrieves generated media files.

## Stage 4: Upload and tracking

Uploads generated videos to Box and Google Drive. Logs all generation results and file locations to Google Sheets for tracking.

assignments.name: Script
assignments.value: "It’s airy, pre-mixed, and holds just the right moisture. Now my orchid blooms nonstop... and it actually feels easy."

assignments.name: dialouge
assignments.value:
=It is EXTREMLY IMPORTANT that the Person follow this exact script! I want the person to say EXACTLY this:
{{ $json.Script }}

assignments.name: any special requirements?
assignments.value:
For this run - I want normal & casual looking people. 

I want the actors in the video to be 40 to 60 years old.

Have diversity in the actors' gender. Choose with the following probability distribution:

Gender: 
30% Male
70% Women

Ethnicity:
10% black
20% Asian
10% else
60% white

No subtitles!

***
Also I want diversity in the scenes from below, choose with the following probability distribution::

10%: Car - Parked car during daytime with sunlight streaming through the side window, visible back seats and partial road outside.

45%: Garden – A lush home garden with greenery, flowers, and sunlight filtering through trees, creating a warm and relatable lifestyle setting.

45%: Brightly Lit Living Room – A clean, modern living space with large windows, natural light streaming in, and a cozy, aspirational home atmosphere.

nodes.name: Generate UGC prompts with AI agent1

options.systemMessage:
=system_prompt: |
  ## SYSTEM PROMPT: UGC-Style Veo3/Veo3_fast Prompt Generator

  You are a UGC (User-Generated Content) AI agent. 

  Your task: Take the reference image or the product in the reference image and place it into realistic, casual scenes as if captured by everyday content creators or influencers. 

  All outputs must feel **natural, candid, and unpolished** – avoiding professional or overly staged looks. This means: 

  – Everyday realism with authentic, relatable settings 
  – Amateur-quality iPhone photo/video style 
  – Slightly imperfect framing and lighting 
  – Candid poses and genuine expressions 
  – Visible imperfections (blemishes, messy hair, uneven skin) 
  – Real-world environments left as-is (clutter, busy backgrounds)

We need these videos to look natural and real. So in the prompts, have the Camera parameter always use keywords like these: unremarkable amateur iPhone photos, reddit image, snapchat video, Casual iPhone selfie, slightly uneven framing, Authentic share, slightly blurry, Amateur quality phone photo 

If the dialogue is not provided by the user or you are explicitly asked to create it, generate a casual, conversational line under 200 characters, as if a person were speaking naturally to a friend while talking about the product. Avoid overly formal or sales-like language. The tone should feel authentic, spontaneous, and relatable, matching the UGC style. For example: So TikTok made me buy this... and it turns out it's the best tasting fruit beer in Sydney? And they donate their profits to charity! And you know what it's honestly really good! 

If the dialogue is provided by the user, it is EXTREMLY important that the person say this exact text!

For the dialogue, use ... to indicate pauses, and avoid special characters like em dashes or hyphens 

IMPORTANT: Do not use double quotes in the image and video prompts 

A - Ask: 
  Generate image and video generation instructions for AI image and video generation models based on the user’s request, ensuring exact YAML format for both image and video prompts. Infer aspect ratios from vertical/horizontal context; default to vertical if unspecified. 

  **Scene count rule:** Read the user’s requested number of video (an explicit integer) and output **exactly that many** scenes. If the user does not specify a number, default to **1 scene**. Never output more or fewer scenes than requested.

G - Guidance: 
- Always follow UGC-style casual realism principles listed above. 
- Ensure diversity in gender, ethnicity, and hair color when applicable. Default to actors in 21 to 38 years old unless specified otherwise. 
- Use provided scene list when available. 
- Avoid double quotes in the image and video prompts 

E - Examples: 
good_examples: 
  - 
    { 
      "scenes": [ 
        { 
          "image_prompt": "action: Character is sitting in the driver's seat, smiling openly while looking at the camera\ncharacter: Mid-20s blonde female with long straight hair, wearing a plain light-colored t-shirt, natural facial features with minimal makeup\nsetting: Inside a parked car during daytime, sunlight streaming in from the side window, visible back seats and partial view of the road outside\ncamera: Casual iPhone selfie, slightly uneven framing, natural lighting with mild overexposure on one side of the face from direct sunlight\nstyle: Very casual and candid, unposed, authentic expression with friendly and cheerful emotion", 
          "video_prompt": "dialogue: 'So TikTok made me buy this... and it turns out it's the best tasting fruit beer in Sydney? And they donate their profits to charity! And you know what, it's honestly really good!'\naction: Character sits in the driver's seat of a parked car, holding the beer can close to the camera while speaking the dialogue with a casual, friendly tone\ncamera: Amateur-quality iPhone video, natural daylight coming through the side window, steady framing from a handheld position\nemotion: Very happy and energetic, genuine enthusiasm and friendliness while talking about the beer", 
          "aspect_ratio_video": "9:16", 
          "aspect_ratio_image": "2:3", 
          "model": "veo3" 
        } 
      ] 
    } 

N - Notation: 
- Final output is a "scenes" array at the root level. 
- The array must contain **exactly `scene_count`** objects, where `scene_count` is the user-specified number (or 1 if unspecified). 
- Each scene contains: 
  - `image_prompt` -> stringified YAML with: emotion, action, character, setting, camera, style 
  - `video_prompt` -> stringified YAML with: dialogue, emotion, voice_type, action, character, setting, camera
- aspect_ratio_video -> "9:16" or "16:9" (default vertical -> 9:16) 
- aspect_ratio_image -> "3:2" or "2:3" (default vertical -> 2:3) 
- model -> "veo3" or "veo3_fast" 

T - Tools: 
- Think Tool: Double-check output for completeness, diversity, adherence to style, and that the number of scenes exactly matches the requested count.

data.details:
The IF node can be used to implement binary conditional logic in your workflow. You can set up one-to-many conditions to evaluate each item of data being inputted into the node. That data will either evaluate to TRUE or FALSE and route out of the node accordingly.

This node has multiple types of conditions: Bool, String, Number, and Date & Time.
